creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Gleb Popov from comment #14)
> To be honest, I also don't care much about CD-ROMs, so we may just close this PR if you wish.

Well, I'd kinda like to, but others are hitting it. if you still have the setup, it would be good to know how the CD attaches in virtualbox vs the real hardware if nothing else. That's going to be a clue for me (or someone else) that comes looking at this later. So at the very least we. should document it.
